title: Spora Agent Template
description: A reusable agent definition: name, system prompt, tool activations, and per-operation auto-approve defaults. Settings (passwords, secrets) are NEVER included — recipients must configure them in Settings → Tools after import.

id.description: Stable machine identifier. Used as the template's slug and (when imported) as agents.recipe_id.

version.description: Semver version. Bumped on template revisions.

system_prompt.description: System prompt. Recipients see a SYSTEM_PROMPT_MISSING warning if empty.

tools.description: Tools the agent should have activated. Tools whose tool_class is not currently registered are skipped at import time with a TOOL_PLUGIN_MISSING warning — settings are NEVER exported.

tool_class.description: Fully-qualified PHP class name of a registered ToolInterface implementation.

enabled.description: Whether this tool should be enabled for the agent.

operations.description: Per-operation overrides. An operation whose name is not declared by the tool is skipped at import time with an OPERATION_UNKNOWN warning.

enabled.description: Whether this operation is enabled. Omit to inherit the tool default.

auto_approve.description: If true, this operation is pre-approved and does not require user confirmation before execution.

required_plugins.description: Plugin slugs the template assumes are installed. Missing plugins produce a non-fatal PLUGIN_MISSING warning at import time. Plugins are NEVER auto-installed.

icon.description: Bundled icon name from the Spora palette. Defaults to 'puzzle'.
